sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93605" key="sekoundoke/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σεκουνδοκέριος</orth> and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σεισ-κήριος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <sense id="n93605.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">secundocerius,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.17.5</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.59.1.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
